clusters.title: Middle East live: Iran begins days-long funeral for late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
clusters.neutral_headline: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
bullet_summary: Reported by France24, NPR News, BBC World and others

items.title: Middle East live: Iran begins days-long funeral for late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
items.standfirst: Iran on Saturday began a days-long funeral for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The 86-year-old was killed in an air strike at the start of the US-Israeli war with Iran. Mourners wept when authorities unveiled the casket containing Khamenei’s body at the Grand Mosalla in Tehran. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.
items.content: Iran on Saturday began a days-long funeral for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The 86-year-old was killed in an air strike at the start of the US-Israeli war with Iran. Mourners wept when authorities unveiled the casket containing Khamenei’s body at the Grand Mosalla in Tehran. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

items.title: Iran begins dayslong funeral for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei
items.standfirst: Iran began a dayslong funeral Saturday for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, months after an airstrike killed him at the start of the war. He was 86.
items.content: Iran began a dayslong funeral Saturday for the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, months after an airstrike killed him at the start of the war. He was 86.(Image credit: Altaf Qadri)

items.title: Iran begins public mourning for Ayatollah killed in February
items.standfirst: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.
items.content: Ali Khamenei's body will lie in state in Tehran's Grand Mosalla from Friday ahead of days-long funeral events.

items.title: Peace talks paused as Iran begins dayslong funeral for slain supreme leader
items.standfirst: The flag-draped casket of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was put on display in Tehran with millions expected to attend his dayslong funeral.
items.content: The flag-draped casket of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was put on display in Tehran with millions expected to attend his dayslong funeral.

items.title: Iran says millions expected at funeral for former supreme leader
items.standfirst: Foreign dignitaries and senior Iranian leaders honored Ayatollah Ali Khamenei today, months after he was killed by the United States and Israel. Iran says organizers expect 15 to 20 million people at his dayslong state funeral. NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Tehran.
items.content: Foreign dignitaries and senior Iranian leaders honored Ayatollah Ali Khamenei today, months after he was killed by the United States and Israel. Iran says organizers expect 15 to 20 million people at his dayslong state funeral. NBC News' Richard Engel reports from Tehran.

items.title: Iran begins mourning for Khamenei under tight security
items.standfirst: Dignitaries from more than 100 nations pay respects to slain supreme leader ahead of official funeral
items.content: Dignitaries from more than 100 nations pay respects to slain supreme leader ahead of official funeral

items.title: Iran plans dayslong funeral for Supreme Leader Khamenei after war death
items.standfirst: The country's theocracy hopes to see millions flood the streets of the capital beginning Saturday in scenes reminiscent to the burial of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989.
items.content: The country's theocracy hopes to see millions flood the streets of the capital beginning Saturday in scenes reminiscent to the burial of the late Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ruhollah Khomeini in 1989.(Image credit: Vahid Salemi)

items.title: Iran gets ready for Khamenei's funeral
items.standfirst: He was assassinated in a #US-Israeli strike in February 2026. #Iran's Supreme leader Ali #Khamenei's #funerals are set to be held on July 4, with authorities expecting between 15 and 20 million people to attend.
items.content: He was assassinated in a #US-Israeli strike in February 2026. #Iran's Supreme leader Ali #Khamenei's #funerals are set to be held on July 4, with authorities expecting between 15 and 20 million people to attend.

items.title: Iran’s injured Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei won’t attend his father’s funeral, sources say
items.standfirst: Mojtaba Khamenei was severely injured in the strike that killed his father at the start of the war, according to three people with knowledge of the matter.
items.content: Mojtaba Khamenei was severely injured in the strike that killed his father at the start of the war, according to three people with knowledge of the matter.

items.title: Millions expected at delayed Khamenei funeral as Iran seeks to project strength
items.standfirst: Iran says millions are expected to turn out for the funeral, which will serve as a grand religious and political spectacle months after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed.
items.content: Iran says millions are expected to turn out for the funeral, which will serve as a grand religious and political spectacle months after Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed.

clusters.title: Watch: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are married - here's how the day unfolded
clusters.neutral_headline: Taylor Swift marries Travis Kelce in NYC ceremony officiated by Adam Sandler
bullet_summary: The ceremony was officiated by Adam Sandler, a Swift spokesperson said in a Friday statement confirming the nuptials
Superfans and sleuths appear to have their hunches confirmed on Friday, as dozens of black cars dropped off elegantly dressed guests outside of Madison Square Garden in New York City
Romantic, fairytale vibes could dominate Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's reported wedding event in New York City on Friday

clusters.title: Trump hails American exceptionalism before railing at communism in US 250th celebration
clusters.neutral_headline: Trump launches America’s 250th birthday celebrations with partisan attack
bullet_summary: Reported by France24, Guardian World, Financial Times

items.title: Trump hails American exceptionalism before railing at communism in US 250th celebration
items.standfirst: President Donald Trump ushered in the 250th anniversary of US independence on Friday with rhetoric about American exceptionalism before calling on the country to fight what he called a sinister threat of communism. The speech evoked the Red Scare of the 1950s, one of the country’s ugliest chapters, when alleged communists were persecuted and blacklisted from jobs across America.
items.content: President Donald Trump ushered in the 250th anniversary of US independence on Friday with rhetoric about American exceptionalism before calling on the country to fight what he called a sinister threat of communism. The speech evoked the Red Scare of the 1950s, one of the country’s ugliest chapters, when alleged communists were persecuted and blacklisted from jobs across America.

items.title: Trump launches America’s 250th birthday celebrations with partisan attack
items.standfirst: In a speech at Mount Rushmore on Friday evening, the US president claimed a resurgent ‘communist menace’ posed a severe threat the countryDonald Trump has kicked off America’s 250th birthday weekend with an extraordinary partisan attack on what he called the “communist menace” in America, framing its supporters as “the enemy of July 4th, 1776”.The US president spoke for half an hour on Friday night at Mount Rushmore in South Dakota, the latest stop on his tour celebrating the milestone anniversary of the US declaration of independence from Britain. Continue reading...
items.content: In a speech at Mount Rushmore on Friday evening, the US president claimed a resurgent ‘communist menace’ posed a severe threat the countryDonald Trump has kicked off America’s 250th birthday weekend with an extraordinary partisan attack on what he called the “communist menace” in America, framing its supporters as “the enemy of July 4th, 1776”.The US president spoke for half an hour on Friday night at Mount Rushmore in South Dakota, the latest stop on his tour celebrating the milestone anniversary of the US declaration of independence from Britain. Continue reading...

items.content: President kicked off 250th anniversary events with a preview of a likely line of attack against Democrats in coming elections

clusters.title: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller
clusters.neutral_headline: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller
bullet_summary: Reported by BBC Top Stories, France24

items.title: Argentina overcome Cape Verde in extra-time thriller
items.standfirst: Argentina overcome a huge scare as they beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time thanks to a deflected header from Cristian Romero to advance to the last 16.
items.content: Argentina overcome a huge scare as they beat Cape Verde 3-2 in extra time thanks to a deflected header from Cristian Romero to advance to the last 16.

items.title: World Cup 2026: Argentina survive epic Cape Verde scare after extra-time thriller
items.standfirst: Argentina eliminated a heroic Cape Verde side 3-2 in an extraordinary Round of 32 encounter at Miami after a pulsating extra-time period that tested the defending champions to their limit. The Albiceleste's resilience was matched only by the Blue Shaks' refusal to surrender, with the match swinging dramatically multiple times before Cristian Romero's 111th-minute header sealed Argentina's passage to the last 16.
items.content: Argentina eliminated a heroic Cape Verde side 3-2 in an extraordinary Round of 32 encounter at Miami after a pulsating extra-time period that tested the defending champions to their limit. The Albiceleste's resilience was matched only by the Blue Shaks' refusal to surrender, with the match swinging dramatically multiple times before Cristian Romero's 111th-minute header sealed Argentina's passage to the last 16.
